2605.17833.title: Efficient Bilevel Optimization for Meta Label Correction in Noisy Label Learning
2605.17833.paper_summary: Training a deep neural network with noisy labels could reduce data annotation cost but may introduce noise into the learned model. In meta label correction approaches, an additional meta model besides the main model is trained with a small, clean dataset to correct the large, noisy dataset. However, the update of the meta model requires the computation of hypergradients at the inner step of the main model which signif- icantly increases the computational cost. To improve the training efficiency, we first introduce the dynamic barrier gradient descent into standard meta label correction. While this naive extenstion is able to speed up the training process to approximately first- order complexity, it lacks mechanisms to prevent the leakage of noisy signals to the main model and to stabilize the learning of the meta model. Based on this observation, we propose the EBOMLC method, which is designed with three key improvements including one-step inner loop update, mixture upper loss and alignment- aware dynamic barrier. Empirical results on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 demonstrate that EBOMLC consistently outperforms other baselines, especially under high noise rate settings, while reducing training time of the meta label correction approach.
2605.17833.paper_summary_zh: 訓練一個具有噪音標籤的深度神經網絡可以降低數據標註成本，但可能會將噪音引入學習到的模型中。在元標籤修正方法中，除了主模型外，還會使用一個小的乾淨數據集來訓練額外的元模型，以修正大型的噪音數據集。然而，元模型的更新需要在主模型的內部步驟中計算超梯度，這顯著增加了計算成本。為了提高訓練效率，我們首先將動態障礙梯度下降引入標準的元標籤修正中。雖然這一簡單的擴展能夠將訓練過程的速度提高到大約一階複雜度，但它缺乏防止噪音信號泄漏到主模型以及穩定元模型學習的機制。基於這一觀察，我們提出了EBOMLC方法，該方法設計了三個關鍵改進，包括一步內循環更新、混合上損失和對齊感知的動態障礙。在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100上的實證結果顯示，EBOMLC始終優於其他基準，特別是在高噪音率設置下，同時減少了元標籤修正方法的訓練時間。
2605.17833.author: Ba Hoang Anh Nguyen et.al.
2605.17833.authors: Ba Hoang Anh Nguyen, Viet Cuong Ta
